name: com.brassworks.sidecar.clockwork-enemy-parts-set09
displayName: Brassworks Breach Clockwork Enemy Parts Set 09
description: Unity-only sidecar package for a modular clockwork mechanical enemy parts family: small skitter unit, humanoid boiler brute, and wall/ceiling sentry. Visual-only lookdev with deterministic materials, procedural meshes, rigging sockets, and preview evidence.

samples.displayName: Clockwork Enemy Parts Set 09 Preview Notes
samples.description: Preview and quarantine import notes for the generated clockwork enemy parts family.
